work_unit: pachong:pa-m-002-ssrf-safe-url — PA-M-002 route-fix: crawler HTTP 层 SSRF via redirect (fetch.py + anti_detect.py) 抽 _is_safe_url + httpx event_hooks 逐跳校验 Location
situation: audit-2026-07-05-010 (x-tool pachong-master deep audit) finding PA-M-002 (priority 4, medium). crawler/fetch.py:57 _build_fingerprinted_client 与 crawler/anti_detect.py:121 _init_httpx_tls 均构造 httpx.AsyncClient(follow_redirects=True) 无 host/scheme/IP 校验；被爬站点或被投毒 API 响应可驱动 30x Location 指向 169.254.169.254 云元数据 / 127.0.0.1 / 10.x 内网，httpx 自动跟随，响应体进 raw_text 落库 + web_admin notice_detail 展示 → 盲 SSRF 云凭证泄漏。crawler/ggzy_national.py:227 urljoin(base,detail) 对 '//evil' 与 'https://internal' 亦不拦 (本 fix 不动 ggzy_national，留 _planned_files 范围内的 fetch+anti_detect 两文件)。这是真实安全 bug，非自指 churn (crawler 业务代码，非引擎机械文件)。
action: 在 fetch.py 抽 _is_safe_url(url) 校验器 (scheme∈{http,https} + host 非空非 localhost + IP 字面量拒 private/loopback/link-local/multicast/reserved/unspecified；hostname 放行不做同步 DNS 以免阻塞事件循环) + _ssrf_request_hook(request) httpx event hook。关键洞察：httpx 在 follow_redirects=True 下每个 redirect 跳均触发 request event hook → hook 内校验 str(request.url) 命中内网/元数据即抛 SSRFBlockedError 阻断，逐跳堵死 redirect-SSRF。SSRFBlockedError 继承 httpx.RequestError 使既有 except httpx.RequestError → ConnectionError 兜底，错误面与超时/连接失败一致。fetch._build_fingerprinted_client 接 event_hooks={'request':[_ssrf_request_hook]}。anti_detect._init_httpx_tls 同接 hook (from .fetch import)；anti_detect.get/post 另加 _is_safe_url(url) 初始 URL 预校验 (curl_cffi 路径无 httpx event hook，初始 URL 预校验为 curl_cffi 分支兜底)。2 文件 route-fix，不触及 .claude/public-interfaces.txt → opt-worktree 判 route-fix 复用同 area worktree opt-pachong-1783229257。

direction: route-fix (route-fix 复用 opt-pachong-1783229257，第 3 commit 叠栈)
outcome_evidence: _is_safe_url 逻辑 11 用例全过: https://www.ggzy.gov.cn/api/list=True, http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/=False (云元数据主向量堵), https://127.0.0.1:8080=False, https://localhost=False, http://10.0.0.1=False, http://[::1]/=False (IPv6 loopback), ftp://example.com=False (scheme), https://example.gov.cn/notice/123=True, //evil.com/x=False (协议相对), https://192.168.1.1=False, http://8.8.8.8/=True (公网 DNS 放行) — ALL PASS
python3 -m py_compile crawler/fetch.py crawler/anti_detect.py → PY_COMPILE_OK 两文件语法通过

audit_findings.finding: PA-M-002: _build_fingerprinted_client httpx.AsyncClient(follow_redirects=True) 无 host/IP 校验；被爬站点 30x Location 指向 169.254.169.254/127.0.0.1/10.x 时 httpx 自动跟随 → 盲 SSRF 云元数据/内网，响应体进 raw_text 落库 + admin 可见。
audit_findings.remediation: 抽 _is_safe_url + _ssrf_request_hook，event_hooks={'request':[hook]} 逐跳校验 redirect Location，命中内网/元数据抛 SSRFBlockedError (已实施 commit 106a035)。

audit_findings.finding: PA-M-002: _init_httpx_tls httpx.AsyncClient(follow_redirects=True) 同 fetch.py 无校验；AntiDetectSession.get/post curl_cffi 路径亦无初始 URL 校验 (curl_cffi 无 httpx event hook 可挂)。
audit_findings.remediation: httpx 客户端接同 _ssrf_request_hook (from .fetch import)；get/post 入口加 _is_safe_url(url) 预校验，curl_cffi 与 httpx 两路径均兜底 (已实施 commit 106a035)。
